data.title: Hyundai World Premiere Headed to New York International Auto Show
data.description: A livestreamed press conference is scheduled for Wednesday, April 1, during media day at the 2026 New York International Auto Show. In Fountain Valley, California, on March 30, 2026, Hyundai announced that they will reveal a significant world premiere during this event. This unveiling is set to occur during a press conference at the 2026 show.

data.title: MightyMeals CEO Stefano Marzano Reunites with Children's National Doctor Who Helped Restore His Vision
data.description: In Washington, MightyMeals' CEO and Executive Chef, Stefano Marzano, met with Dr. Marijean Miller from Children’s National Hospital. Dr. Miller had treated Marzano from birth to age 18 when he was blind. Thanks to the care from Children’s National, Marzano now has 20/20 vision with glasses. This reunion marked a significant event in Marzano's personal journey and professional mission. The meeting took place at Children’s National Research & In.

data.title: Columbus and COSMO deepen partnership to accelerate digital transformation in the Waste Management Industry
data.description: A newly formed partnership between Columbus and COSMO CONSULT is set to provide waste and recycling operators in North America and Europe with reverse logistics-centered ERP solutions and advisory services. The collaboration, announced in Minneapolis on March 30, 2026, aims to bolster support for the industry by combining expertise and resources. This initiative is expected to benefit a significant number of waste management and recycling businesses across the regions.

data.title: Rogers-O'Brien Doubles Down on $20M Centralized Equipment Model as Megaproject Demand Grows
data.description: In Dallas on March 30, 2026, Rogers-O'Brien Construction (RO) announced a significant expansion of its owned equipment platform to $20 million to accommodate the growing logistical requirements of modern construction projects. This move aims to scale RO Equipment Services (ROES) and effectively support the intricate demands of the construction industry. The initial project commenced as...

data.title: Checklist Before a Child's First Eye Exam: HelloNation Article Features Optometry Expert Dr. Kimberly Arnett
data.description: In Florence, Kentucky, on March 30, 2026, it was detailed in a published article how proper preparation, keen observation, and understanding of medical background play a vital role in ensuring precise pediatric eye examinations. Parents are advised to be aware of key information before booking their child's initial eye check-up to guarantee optimal results. The article provides valuable insights to aid parents in making informed decisions regarding their child's eye health.

data.title: Weekly report share buyback from March 23 to March 27, 2026
data.description: Technip Energies (PARIS:TE) has reported its share buyback activity for the period ranging from March 23 to March 27, 2026, in compliance with relevant regulations. During this time frame, the company disclosed purchases of its own shares.

data.title: AviatorPro Announces FAA Part 147 Training Program at ATEC, Expanding into Aviation Maintenance Education
data.description: Scottsdale, Arizona - On March 30, 2026, AviatorPro made headlines by unveiling its latest venture in aviation training technology at the Aviation Technician Education Council Conference. The company introduced its new FAA Part 147 training program, showcasing a notable move towards enhancing skills in aviation maintenance. This development underscores AviatorPro's commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry.

data.title: Alaska Airlines names Lindsay-Rae McIntyre Chief People Officer
data.description: With years of experience from Microsoft and IBM, the new hire has a strong background in team building, talent growth, and scaling enterprise solutions for global companies. McIntyre will oversee the global airline's human resources strategy, focusing on aligning it with the business objectives.

data.title: Elysian Strengthens Technology Leadership with Appointment of Chief Technology Officer
data.description: In New York, Elysian, the pioneering AI-native Third-Party Administrator (TPA) tailored for intricate commercial claims, has appointed Zack Moy as the Chief Technology Officer. Moy brings 15 years of expertise in addressing engineering challenges, particularly in organizing unstructured data to enhance decision-making for knowledge workers. His role at Elysian focuses on enhancing the processing of complex commercial claims, where data is dense and often unclear, allowing for more efficient and effective outcomes.

data.title: Dr. Will Cole Joins Forces with Dr. Josh Axe at The Health Institute to Redefine the Future of Cellular Health
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 30, 2026, a significant development in the healthcare sector has arisen. The Health Institute (THI), under the direction of Dr. Josh Axe, has confirmed the inclusion of Dr. Will Cole within the institution. This partnership signifies a notable collaboration between two renowned figures in functional health.

data.title: Certis Oncology Unveils Oncology Intelligence® Platform Integrating Predictive and Agentic AI with Biological Validation
data.description: Certis Oncology, a company utilizing AI in healthcare, has introduced Certis Oncology Intelligence®, a comprehensive platform focused on analyzing therapeutic response. This integrated system combines predictive modeling, AI-powered biological data exploration, and functional validation in cancer models. The platform aims to provide data-driven insights into treatment effectiveness. This innovative approach to translational research merges computational analysis and biological validation to enhance understanding of therapeutic responses.

data.title: SHE Media and Mirror Digital Join Forces to Deliver Inclusive, Performance-Driven Media for Leading Brands
data.description: On March 30, 2026, SHE Media and Mirror Digital revealed a collaborative effort to transform brand engagement with diverse audiences. This partnership merges the unique strengths of both companies, leveraging Mirror Digital's expertise in cultural trends and creator-driven narratives. The aim is to revolutionize how brands connect with inclusive audiences. This strategic alliance marks a significant move in the industry, combining the resources and reach of these two trailblazing entities.

data.title: CREATE WELLNESS ANNOUNCES SIGNIFICANT GROWTH CAPITAL ROUND FROM LEADING CPG INVESTORS
data.description: Today, Create Wellness announced a successful funding round led by Alliance Consumer Growth (ACG) and Impact Capital. The funding will support Create's omnichannel expansion and category innovation as they seek to broaden their retail presence. This marks a significant step for the company, known for their creatine gummy product. The funding round is expected to bring in a substantial amount of capital, reflecting investors' confidence in Create's growth potential.

data.title: HelloNation Explains Belgian Beer Differences With Beer Expert Justin Day
data.description: A recent publication by HelloNation discusses the impact of yeast strains, bottle conditioning, and style diversity on Belgian beer. The article highlights how these factors contribute to the unique characteristics of Belgian beer compared to other styles. It addresses the importance of understanding these elements for drinkers to fully appreciate the diversity and complexity of Belgian beer. The publication comes from New Castle, Del., and was released on March 30, 2026.
